name: Priorityone Credit Union Of Florida
description_short: Priority One Credit Union is a Florida-based credit union established in 1991, serving over 9,900 members with $144.2M in assets and offering comprehensive banking services.
description_long:
Priority One Credit Union was established in 1991 and is headquartered in Sunrise, Florida, operating under a state charter. The institution has grown to serve over 9,900 loyal members and manages assets exceeding $144.2 million. With 38 dedicated employees, the credit union maintains a focused operation centered in South Florida.

The credit union offers a comprehensive range of financial products including checking and savings accounts, money market accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), credit cards, auto loans, personal loans, and mortgage options (fixed-rate and adjustable-rate mortgages). Digital banking services include online banking, mobile app access for iOS and Android, bill pay, e-statements, remote deposit capture, mobile payments, and electronic signature authentication. Members also have access to drive-thru teller service and a network of 1 branch and 2 ATMs.

Priority One distinguishes itself as a member-focused credit union with longstanding roots in the Sunrise community since 1991. The institution provides personalized service through a relatively small but dedicated team and maintains an active community Q&A forum where members can seek financial guidance. The credit union offers financial calculators and tools to help members make informed decisions.

As a small regional credit union, Priority One serves primarily Florida residents and operates with limited physical presence (1 branch, 2 ATMs). While they offer competitive products including mortgages and personal loans, their asset base and branch network are considerably smaller than major banks. The institution's value proposition centers on personalized member service rather than extensive branch availability or cutting-edge digital innovation.
services: Fixed-rate mortgages (15+ years and 15 years or less)
pros: Established 33+ years (since 1991) with demonstrated stability and community presence
Comprehensive product suite including mortgages, auto loans, personal loans, and credit cards
Mobile banking app available for both iOS and Android devices
Advanced digital services including remote deposit capture, mobile payments, and e-statements
Active community Q&A forum providing member support and financial guidance
Multiple account types available (regular savings, money market, share certificates/CDs)
Online and mobile banking available with 24/7 access to account services
cons: Very limited physical presence with only 1 branch and 2 ATMs, restricting in-person access
Lobby currently closed (status as of data collection), indicating operational constraints
No reviews available on the profile site, making it difficult to assess member satisfaction
Membership eligibility restricted to Florida residents, limiting geographic reach
Small asset base ($144.2M) compared to traditional banks, potentially limiting loan products and competitive rates
best_for: Florida residents seeking personalized credit union banking with long-term institutional stability
Members prioritizing digital banking convenience over physical branch availability
Borrowers interested in competitive auto loans and personal loans from a local cooperative institution
diagnosis: Priority One Credit Union is best suited for Florida residents who value stability, personalized member service, and comprehensive financial products over extensive branch networks. The primary caveat is the severely limited physical presence (1 branch, 2 ATMs) and current lobby closure, making this institution suitable primarily for members comfortable with digital banking as their main access channel.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
